data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for filterable facts.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for filterable facts, such as 'has Class C license' and 'background check verified'. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm these specific requirements are satisfied. Instead, the evidence focuses on other aspects of the saga lifecycle, leading to an inconclusive result regarding the validation of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of filterable facts such as 'has Class C license', 'background check verified', and 'expires after 90 days'.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the filterable facts requirement.
